## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Security-related

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `python -m compileall -q .`
- [ ] I manually tested the changed flow
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed

## Risk Assessment

Describe possible risks and rollback plan if needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets added
- [ ] User-facing text is in English
- [ ] Scope is focused and reviewable
